title: Abdu Rabbu Mansour Hadi, Exiled Ex-President of Yemen, Dies at 80
summary_full: In a country fractured by civil war and other crises, he held the title of president from 2012 to 2022 and was widely seen as an ineffective ruler.
summary_public: In a country fractured by civil war and other crises, he held the title of president from 2012 to 2022 and was widely seen as an ineffective ruler.
